title: Adaptive proof selection shaping

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement the first bounded slice of #899 Adaptive Proof Route Selection: persist advisory lifecycle-discovered proof route hints and live-confirm them during proof selection.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not make learned hints host policy. Do not emit a learned command unless live target capabilities still confirm it. Keep source-repo proof commands out of host repos unless configured or discovered.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact hint schema, lifecycle payload shape, compact/detailed projection, and narrow tests for the first slice.
canonical_core.escalate_when: The slice starts defining host quality policy, unsafe command execution, broad detector coverage, or proof evidence persistence beyond advisory route hints.
canonical_core.next_action: Run selected proof for the first advisory route-hints slice, update closeout fields, commit, then continue to the next #899 slice.
proof_expectations: uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_lifecycle_cli.py tests/test_workspace_proof_cli.py
completion_criteria: Non-dry-run init/adopt writes advisory proof route hints.
Setup reports the hint surface without becoming a mutation command.
Proof selection reports learned_route_hints and separates live-confirmed from stale hints.
Learned hints do not override host policy or bypass live target capability checks.

goal: Implement bounded committed slices for #899 Adaptive Proof Route Selection.
non_goals: Do not make learned proof route hints host policy.
Do not emit source-repo proof commands in host repos unless configured or discovered there.
Do not infer that a discovered command is sufficient proof.

intent.outcome: Implement the first bounded slice of #899 Adaptive Proof Route Selection.
intent.constraints: Hints are advisory only, require live confirmation, and must not become host proof policy.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest contract and runtime shape that can persist lifecycle-discovered hints and expose confirmation state in proof output.
intent.escalation: Escalate if the work becomes host quality policy, broad detector expansion, or proof execution persistence.

execution.next_step: Run selected proof for the first advisory route-hints slice, update closeout fields, commit, then continue to the next #899 slice.
execution.proof: Focused lifecycle/proof tests, ruff, contract tooling, and structured inventory checks.

invariants: Learned route hints are advisory, not host policy.
Proof selection must live-confirm route hints before using them as support for commands.

planning_mode.halt_instruction: Implementation mode active for #899 first slice; keep edits bounded to advisory proof route hints.
minimal_success_criteria: lifecycle writes advisory proof route hints
proof output live-confirms or stales learned hints
focused tests and contract checks pass
planning_mode.manual_tightening_policy: update this plan only for slice intent, proof, closeout, and continuation

required_continuation.activation trigger: After the advisory route-hints slice is committed, continue with the next #899 milestone.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Lifecycle can persist advisory proof route hints and proof selection can report live-confirmed versus stale learned hints.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Host policy precedence UI, broader detector coverage, proof execution evidence feedback, manual verification templates, and PR/dogfooding expansion.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Setup is read-only, so persistence belongs in init/adopt lifecycle mutation while setup reports the managed hint surface.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: focused tests, ruff, contract tooling, and structured inventory checks passed
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: formalize the explicit proof-route decision model and compact/detailed output split.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Implement the Adaptive Proof Route Selection epic on autopilot.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Advance #899 through bounded committed slices with PR-backed visibility.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: First slice: advisory setup/adopt proof route hints with live confirmation in proof selection.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the scaffolded plan still matches the promoted item before broad implementation.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Planning state, this execplan, proof-selection runtime, workspace surface contracts/schemas, structured inventory, and focused lifecycle/proof tests.
execution_bounds.max changed files: Keep each slice narrow enough to commit independently.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: focused pytest, ruff, contract tooling, structured inventory, and changed-path proof selection.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any broad redesign that makes Agentic Workspace own host quality policy or introduces unsafe command execution.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated generated CLI work, broad detector expansion, proof execution storage, or host security/compliance policy.
execution_bounds.manual JSON validation: Do not run ad hoc JSON validation loops; use summary or package checks.

stop_conditions.stop when: The current slice is committed and the next slice is either selected or blocked.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: The work becomes broad policy design instead of route assistance.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: The slice expands beyond advisory route hints and proof output confirmation.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Focused proof, contract checks, or changed-path proof cannot validate the slice.

context_budget.live working set: This execplan, the promoted item, and the narrow files needed for the current implementation step.
context_budget.recoverable later: Repo background, historical reviews, and deferred backlog unless compact outputs point there.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, and closeout_distillation before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Route to the narrowest relevant memory only when the task needs durable repo knowledge.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Fill in execution bounds, touched paths, and validation before implementation starts.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, handoff, or closeout.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Implement #899 on autopilot through bounded committed slices.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Learned hints remain advisory and live-confirmed; host policy remains host-owned.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Slice boundaries, exact contract fields, tests, and proof commands.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A slice requires broad policy decisions, unsafe command execution, or host-repo quality ownership.

post_decomposition_delegation.decision rule: After this slice is bounded, decide whether direct work, read-only exploration, implementation handoff, validation handoff, or stronger review improves quality or saves tokens safely.
post_decomposition_delegation.required evidence: slice id, route, reason, quality risk, token-saving class, read-first refs, write scope, proof burden, stop conditions, and return contract

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve the larger intended outcome separately from this bounded slice.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Keep the slice bounded while carrying any larger follow-on through explicit continuation fields.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this slice advance the declared larger outcome, or only complete the local task?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_lifecycle_cli.py tests/test_workspace_proof_cli.py

Proof selection reports learned_route_hints and separates live-confirmed from stale hints.
Learned hints do not override host policy or bypass live target capability checks.

execution_run.what happened: Added advisory proof route hint persistence during init/adopt, setup reporting for the hint surface, and proof output that separates live-confirmed from stale learned hints.
execution_run.scope touched: planning state, this execplan, workspace surface contracts/schemas, structured inventory, CLI route-hint discovery/loading/confirmation, and focused lifecycle/proof tests
execution_run.changed surfaces: state.toml; adaptive-proof-selection-shaping.plan.json; cli.py; workspace_surfaces.json; workspace_surfaces_manifest.schema.json; proof_route_hints.schema.json; structured_file_inventory.json; lifecycle/proof tests
execution_run.validations run: focused pytest route-hint tests; ruff on touched CLI/tests; contract tooling; structured inventory; planning summary; planning doctor; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace; root_cli_authority defaults; contract ruff; tests/test_workspace_cli.py
execution_run.result for continuation: first #899 slice ready to commit; larger adaptive proof route selection epic remains open
execution_run.next step: Commit this slice, push/open the draft PR, then continue with the next #899 slice.

finished_run_review.intent served: bounded first slice served; larger epic remains open
finished_run_review.config compliance: used configured repo-local CLI invocation and selected changed-path proof
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; learned hints remain advisory and live-confirmed
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: continue #899 on the same active plan

proof_report.validation proof: Passed: focused route-hint pytest (4 tests), ruff touched CLI/tests, contract tooling, structured inventory, planning summary, planning doctor, make test-workspace, make lint-workspace, root_cli_authority defaults, contract ruff, and tests/test_workspace_cli.py.
proof_report.proof achieved now: The first advisory route-hints slice is locally validated.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Implement #899 on autopilot through bounded committed slices.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Slice 1 persists advisory route hints and exposes live-confirmed/stale learned hints in proof output.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: advisory setup/adopt proof route hints with proof-time live confirmation
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: closeout fields updated before slice commit

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: The committed slice only implements advisory persisted route hints and live confirmation; the broader adaptive proof route selection model remains intentionally incomplete.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: proof_route_hints schema/surface, init/setup/proof CLI behavior, and tests proving live-confirmed versus stale hints.
closure_check.reopen trigger: A host repo needs route decisions beyond advisory hints, compact/detailed decision projection, host policy precedence, broader detectors, execution evidence, or manual verification templates.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
signals found: Dogfooding: writing an empty proof-route-hints cache during init would add avoidable footprint to repos with no discovered routes.
signals fixed: Init now writes proof-route-hints.json only when hints exist or when an existing file must be refreshed.
